tagline: The company lifecycle, as installable skills.

start_here.building_a_company: Start with butterOPC. It designs the company — mission, vision, strategy, OKRs, the operating model, the operating rhythm. Then butterOPCOffice stands up a live team workspace to run it. Use this path only when there is an actual company/venture to design and operate.
start_here.just_building: Skip the company layer. First run butterRecipe — check the Recipes Hub for a ready-made clone of what you need. If it exists, clone it and you are done. If not, butterBuild builds it, and butterRecipeMaker can turn the build into a recipe so the next person just clones. You do not need OKRs and an operating rhythm to ship a tool. Add butterOPC later, only when you genuinely have a company to run.
start_here.rule: Company -> butterOPC. Just building -> butterRecipe first (clone if it exists), then butterBuild.

install.core_plugin: butterSkills — bundles butterOPC, butterOPCOffice, butterRecipe, butterRecipeMaker.
install.sibling_plugin: butterBuild — the build/QA/ship toolchain (~50 skills). Ships as its own plugin in the same marketplace; installed separately because it is a large toolchain with its own build system.

skills.name: butterOPC
skills.does: Three-tier operating framework — Direction (Mission/Vision/Strategy/OKRs) x Operating Model (customer-value pillars x stakeholder support) x Operating Rhythm (annual to daily), on a settling Foundation.
skills.use_when: You are designing, planning, or auditing a company or venture — OKRs, priorities, operating rhythm, strategy-to-execution.
skills.skip_when: You just want to build one app or tool. This is company design, not app building.

skills.name: butterOPCOffice
skills.does: Deploys a team workspace app on Butterbase — Notion-style pages and databases, command-K semantic search, email-domain-gated team auth, pre-seeded with the butterOPC framework.
skills.use_when: You have a company to run and want the operating office live for your team.
skills.skip_when: Solo, pre-company, or just prototyping — you do not need a team workspace yet.

skills.name: butterBuild
skills.does: The build, QA, and ship toolchain — headless browser, QA test-and-fix, codex review, design review, ship, land-and-deploy, and more (~50 skills).
skills.use_when: You are building, testing, or shipping any app or tool — with or without a company around it. This is the workhorse.
skills.skip_when: Never, if you are building something.
skills.install_note: Large toolchain with its own build system. Ships as a sibling plugin in this marketplace; installed separately. See README.

skills.name: butterRecipe
skills.does: Browses the Butterbase Recipes Hub — the catalog of cloneable apps. Reads the live registry, presents what each recipe does, and helps the user clone the right one into their own account.
skills.use_when: Before building anything: check whether a ready-made recipe already exists. Also when the user asks what is available to clone.
skills.skip_when: You already know nothing matches and are going straight to a custom build.

skills.name: butterRecipeMaker
skills.does: Turns an open-source app — or one of your own builds — into a clonable Butterbase recipe. Checks the Recipes Hub first, scans for leaked secrets and PII, ships to a public GitHub repo, registers to the Hub.
skills.use_when: You want a build to become reusable, or a needed recipe does not exist yet and should be built.
skills.skip_when: A genuine one-off you will never reuse, or a recipe already exists (use butterRecipe to clone it).
